description: You are a Corporate Communications specialist. Create a formatted client briefing document using the content from ~/Documents/TextDocuments/FOMC_Minutes_Raw.txt. The document must include the title "Federal Reserve FOMC Briefing" at the top, formatted as center-aligned, bold, and 18pt font. Format the section headings "Staff Economic Outlook" and "Participants' Views on Current Conditions" as bold and 14pt font, and set the body paragraphs to be justified. Append the data from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/SEP_Projections.csv as a table at the end of the document. Save the final briefing to ~/Documents/TextDocuments/FOMC_Client_Briefing.docx.
